name: NoFraud
description: NoFraud provides a fraud prevention API that returns pass/fail decisions with a 100% chargeback guarantee for approved transactions. It integrates with Shopify, BigCommerce, Magento and custom stacks to screen every order in real time.

seo.title: NoFraud — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: NoFraud: NoFraud provides a fraud prevention API that returns pass/fail decisions with a 100% chargeback guarantee for approved transactions. It integrates with

when_to_use: 100% chargeback guarantee on approved Shopify orders
Real-time pass/fail fraud decision for e-commerce checkout
Magento and BigCommerce fraud API integration at order submit
Custom fraud rules combined with ML scoring for merchants
Post-auth fraud review for CNP transaction risk management

pros: Transfers fraud loss risk off the merchant
cons: Strict rules can reject legitimate orders
Guarantee has exclusions to read carefully
Limited control for advanced risk teams
review.verdict: Attractive for SMB e-commerce that wants to outsource fraud risk, costly once you have a real risk team.
review.best_for: SMB Shopify and BigCommerce merchants wanting a guaranteed, hands-off fraud layer.
review.not_for: Large merchants with in-house risk teams who can model fraud cheaper themselves.
